zh.lifeSummary: 當Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett於1530年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾時，他的父親Sir John Henry Gifford28歲，母親Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge27歲。他與Ann Goring在英國哈普爾金斯 索波內結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1568年11月15日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾沙安享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾易亞斯特 泰黑利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett于1530年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾时，他的父亲Sir John Henry Gifford28岁，母亲Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge27岁。他与Ann Goring在英国哈普爾金斯 索波內结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1568年11月15日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾沙安享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾易亞斯特 泰黑利。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett was born in 1530, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Henry Gifford, was 28 and his mother, Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge, was 27. He married Ann Goring in Kings Somborne, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 15 November 1568, in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in East Tytherley, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett est né en 1530, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Henry Gifford, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Ann Goring à Kings Somborne, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 15 novembre 1568, à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à East Tytherley, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett 1530 in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Henry Gifford 28 und seine Mutter Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge 27. Er hat in Kings Somborne, Hampshire, England Ann Goring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. November 1568 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in East Tytherley, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett è nato il nel 1530 nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Henry Gifford, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Ann Goring nel Kings Somborne, Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 novembre 1568, nel Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a East Tytherley, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrettが1530年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Henry Giffordは28歳，母Lady Joan Brydges de Bruggeは27歳であった。イギリスハンプシュアイアキングズ ソンボルンでAnn Goringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1568年11月15日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアエアスト トイスエルリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett(이)가 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Henry Gifford(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge(은)는 27세였다. 그는 영국 함프실르 킨그스 서본에서 Ann Goring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1568년 11월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이스트 타이더리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett nasceu em 1530, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Henry Gifford, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Goring em Kings Somborne, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1568, em Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em East Tytherley, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett родился в 1530 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Henry Gifford было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Brydges de Brugge, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Goring в местности кингс сомборн, хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 15 ноября 1568 г. в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст титирли, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Ann Goring en Kings Somborne, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1568, en Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en East Tytherley, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
